scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_Record-Route:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 8888 RTP/AVP 0 18 100 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:100 X-NSE/8000 a=fmtp:100 200-202 m=video 1240 RTP/AVP 0 18 100 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:100 X-NSE/8000 m=application 1400 RTP/AVP 18 100 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:100 X-NSE/8000 a=sendrecv m=application 4002 TCP/TLS/BFCP * a=setup:passive a=connection:new a=fingerprint:SHA-1 4A:AD:B9:B1:3F:82:18:3B:54:02:12:DF:3E:5D:49:6B:19:E5:7C:AB a=floorctrl:s-only a=confid:4321 a=userid:1234 a=floorid:1 m-stream:10 a=floorid:2 m-stream:12

SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_Record-Route:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 8888 RTP/AVP 0 18 100 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:100 X-NSE/8000 a=fmtp:100 200-202 m=video 1240 RTP/AVP 0 18 100 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:100 X-NSE/8000 m=application 1400 RTP/AVP 18 100 a=rtpmap:18 G729/8000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=no a=rtpmap:100 X-NSE/8000 a=sendrecv m=application 4000 TCP/TLS/BFCP * a=setup:passive a=connection:new a=fingerprint:SHA-1 4A:AD:B9:B1:3F:82:18:3B:54:02:12:DF:3E:5D:49:6B:19:E5:7C:AB a=floorctrl:s-only a=confid:4321 a=userid:1234 a=floorid:1 m-stream:10 a=floorid:2 m-stream:12
